title: Funkcje okna: ROW_NUMBER i RANK
intro: Numeruj i rankuj rekordy bez utraty szczegółowych wierszy.
explanation: Funkcje okna działają na zestawie wierszy z OVER(). PARTITION BY tworzy grupy, ORDER BY ustala kolejność w grupie.

examples.query: SELECT employee_id, department_id, salary, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY department_id ORDER BY salary DESC) AS rn FROM salaries;
SELECT player_id, points, RANK() OVER (ORDER BY points DESC) AS ranking FROM leaderboard;

exercise: Nadaj numer zamówienia klienta wg daty (od najstarszego) w tabeli orders.
solutionHints: PARTITION BY customer_id i ORDER BY created_at ASC.
expectedQueryPatterns: ROW_NUMBER\(\) OVER \(PARTITION BY customer_id ORDER BY created_at ASC\)

validation.expectedSql: SELECT id, customer_id, created_at, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY customer_id ORDER BY created_at ASC) AS order_rank FROM orders

starterQuery: SELECT employee_id, department_id, salary, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY department_id ORDER BY salary DESC) AS rn FROM salaries;
